change: Changed <th> and <td> React keys from String(column.key) to column index to fix duplicate key warnings
impact: Eliminates 17+ React duplicate key warnings across admin pages and OIRS management

change: Changed roles column key from 'id' to 'roles'
impact: Uses actual data property instead of overloading key: 'id'

change: Updated E2E reporter output folder from runs/phase6br1 to runs/phase7a
impact: E2E reports now write to correct Phase 7A directory
